title: aglaia aphanamixis var. frutescens
intro: Aglaia aphanamixis var. frutescens, also known as the yellow aglaia or yellow mangosteen, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Aglaia aphanamixis var. frutescens is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in various pharmaceutical and cosmetic applications.
